nodes.name: Build Context
nodes.notes:
Calls clarence-context-builder sub-workflow.

IMPORTANT: Set the workflowId to your context builder workflow ID after import.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO conversation_sessions (
    user_id,
    session_id,
    conversation_history,
    discovered_data,
    current_phase,
    updated_at
) 
SELECT 
    $1::text,
    $2::uuid,
    $3::jsonb,
    $4::jsonb,
    $5::integer,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE $2 IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (user_id, session_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
    conversation_history = EXCLUDED.conversation_history,
    discovered_data = EXCLUDED.discovered_data,
    current_phase = EXCLUDED.current_phase,
    updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
RETURNING user_id, session_id, current_phase, updated_at;

INSERT INTO clause_chat_messages (
    session_id,
    bid_id,
    sender,
    sender_user_id,
    message,
    message_type,
    created_at
)
SELECT 
    $1::uuid,
    $2,
    $3,
    $4::uuid,
    $5,
    'user_message',
    NOW()
WHERE $1 IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
    $1::uuid,
    $2,
    'clarence',
    NULL,
    $6,
    'ai_response',
    NOW()
WHERE $1 IS NOT NULL;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [    $('Validate Input').first().json.original.sessionId || null,    $('Validate Input').first().json.original.bidId ? "'" + $('Validate Input').first().json.original.bidId + "'::uuid" : 'NULL',    $('Process Response').first().json.context ? $('Process Response').first().json.context.viewer.role : 'user',    $('Validate Input').first().json.original.userId,    $('Validate Input').first().json.original.message.replace(/'/g, "''"),    $('Process Response').first().json.cleanResponse.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 4000)] }}
